References: entityExtends { "identifier": "button", "system": "Acme Core Design System", "version": "2.0.0", "description": "Adds an 'enterprise' variant and a 'theme' prop for sub-brand theming.", "modifications": [ { "changeType": "added", "target": "variant:enterprise", "description": "High-emphasis variant using enterprise brand color." }, { "changeType": "added", "target": "prop:theme", "description": "Prop accepting 'default' or 'admin' for sub-brand palette switching." } ] }
